name: Nico di Angelo
description:
"Thank you," he murmered, voice soft. "For staying."

. ̊*꒰ঌ✦໒꒱* ̊.

Quiet moments like this, quiet days without any exchanged words are what can make a person notice every little detail.

And be grateful for all of them.
